title: Liebherr LTM 1130 - Semi-Annual Inspection & Load Test
description: Semi-annual crane inspection. Load test at 125% capacity - passed. Wire rope inspection - main and auxiliary in acceptable condition. Boom section pin and lock inspection - all secure. Outrigger pad and float inspection. Anti-two block device tested. All limit switches calibrated. Certification renewed.

title: JLG 860SJ - Annual ANSI A92 Inspection
description: Full annual inspection per ANSI A92.20. Platform load sensor tested. Jib extension and rotation tested through full range. All limit switches functional. Hydraulic fluid changed and filter replaced. Battery bank load tested - all cells good. Operator manual in platform. Annual sticker affixed.

title: SJ9250 - 500 Hour Service
description: Drive motor brushes inspected - acceptable. Battery terminals cleaned and torqued. Hydraulic cylinder seals inspected - no leaks. Platform gate latch adjusted. Pothole protection device tested. Drive and lift functions tested through full range. Tires inspected - all acceptable.

title: CAT 320 - 1000 Hour Service
description: Engine oil and all filters replaced. Hydraulic filter replaced. Fuel filter replaced. Bucket pin and bushing inspected and greased. Swing ring lubrication checked. Track tension both sides adjusted within spec. All cylinders inspected - no leaks. Ground engagement tools acceptable.

title: Liebherr LTM 1130 - Tower Jump Preparation Inspection
description: Inspection prior to jumping crane to final high position. All boom connections verified and torqued. Slewing ring bearing clearance checked - within spec. Pendant cables inspected - good condition. Hydraulic connections all secure. Electrical connections weatherproofed. Jump sequence verified with manufacturer technical support.
